message:
feat(tools): normalize agent names across remaining tool entry points

Apply resolve_canonical_agent_name() normalization in build_slots,
identity (whois), macros (start_session, prepare_thread,
file_reservation_cycle, contact_handshake), products (search sender
filter, fetch_inbox), reservations (file_reservation_paths, release,
renew, force_release), and resources. Also aligns commit_limit type
from Option<i32> to Option<u32> in whois.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
